forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 67. North wind 2 to 7 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. Northeast wind 3 to 7 mph.

weather_report:
As the night deepens in Boston, the city rests under a canopy of partly clouded skies, sending forth a gentle whisper of coolness with temperatures expected to settle around a comfortable 67 degrees. The north wind meanders softly, a mere breeze, brushing past those who find themselves wandering beneath the stars. 

Looking ahead to Saturday, the promise of warmth and sunlight beckons with a high near 83. The morning will awaken to the gentle caress of a northeast wind, inviting residents to embrace the day. As the sun ascends, expect a cheerful clarity that will breathe life into the blooming surroundings. It is a splendid opportunity to slip into comfortable attire: perhaps a light cotton shirt paired with breathable shorts, perfect for a leisurely stroll along the Charles or a quiet afternoon spent flipping through pages at a nearby park. As the sun graces the sky and paints the day in warmth and splendid visibility, a spontaneous picnic or a visit to a local café might provide just the respite many seek after a busy week.
